content:
# Recommendations — after iter-075

## HIGH-1 — Build the brick `sliceDualTransport_comp` in SliceTransport.lean (SOLO, `mathlib-build`)
The only thing between (★) `hstar` and a closed c.2. The prover reduced (★) to a single thin-poset /
opensFunctor-composition coherence (see summary.md); the clean realization is a **def-level sectionwise
`sliceDualTransport` pseudofunctoriality / composition law** stated where `sliceDualTransport` is defined:
- Statement shape (iso-level): `isoMk (sliceDualTransport (h ≫ f) M) ≅ <FC-conjugate>(
  (pushforward βh).mapIso (isoMk (sliceDualTransport f M)) ≪≫ isoMk (sliceDualTransport h (M.restrict f))
  ≪≫ dualIsoOfIso (forget.mapIso (restrictFunctorComp h f).app M))`, OR (preferred, matches the residual)
  the sectionwise element form: `X.presheaf.map (eqToHom _).op (((FC.hom.app M.val.dual).app V φ).app
  (op slice_{h≫f}) z) = φ.app (op slice_{f,h}) (rfc-reindexed z)`.
- Proof ingredients (all public, no cross-file blocker): `comp_appIso` cocycle + opensFunctor-composition
  `(h≫f).opensFunctor.obj = f.opensFunctor.obj ∘ h.opensFunctor.obj` (`Opens X` equality) +
  `restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app` (`= M.val.map (eqToHom).op`, Mathlib Sheaf.lean:401) +
  `restrictionMap g φ = (pushforward₀ (Over.map g) _).map φ` (PresheafInternalHom.lean:671) +
  `Subsingleton.elim` on the thin poset + `PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply`.
- **Bypass the adjunction unit/counit entirely** (attempt 5 proved they don't simp-reduce and hit the
  restrictScalars carrier diamond). Prove the composition law directly from `comp_appIso` + opensFunctor.
- SOLO: SliceTransport → DualInverse → PresheafDualPullback → TensorObjInverse is ONE import chain
  (ARCHON_MEMORY iter-029 build-race). This is exactly the iter-073 cross-file-brick pattern that worked.
- Then NEXT iter: `case hstar` closes by `exact sliceDualTransport_comp …` against the green sibling.

## HIGH-2 — blueprint-writer: refresh c.2 close-route prose (lvb-checker MAJOR)
`Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` L8166–8198 still names FC-opacity as the live blocker + the mate/
`conjugate_equiv_leftadjointcompiso_hom` route. Update to reflect: FC-opacity RESOLVED via
`Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app`; residual = thin-poset coherence; close via the new
`sliceDualTransport_comp` brick. No fictional helpers present (the named lemma is real, just unused).
Statement block is correct — prose only. Run this BEFORE the HIGH-1 prover lane consumes the chapter
(HARD GATE: re-confirm complete+correct after the writer).

## MEDIUM — TensorObjInverse.lean {1128,1186,1222,1990} (S3/S4a/bridge-(b)/telescope)
Downstream of c.2; co-dispatch once the dual flank is green (carried from iter-074). Not before — the
import chain makes a co-dispatch with the SliceTransport lane a build race.

## LOW (.lean comment hygiene — for the owning prover, next time it edits the file)
- PresheafDualPullback.lean L707: strip stale `-- DRAFT statement` on the now-finalized
  `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` (lean-auditor major). L837: drop the superseded iter-074
  `-- ATTEMPTS THIS ITER` label. Review cannot edit .lean; flag for the prover.

## Do NOT retry
- §0 mate calculus (`conjugate_equiv_leftadjointcompiso_hom`) to characterise the FC *component* — it
  only gives `conjugateEquiv FC.hom = 𝟙`, not `FC.hom.app`; superseded by `leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app`.
- In-file `simp`/unfold of the `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` unit/counit projections on (★) — empirically
  does not reduce them (manual `where` fields) and hits the restrictScalars carrier diamond (attempt 5).
  Use the def-level brick instead.
- Co-dispatching SliceTransport + PresheafDualPullback/TensorObjInverse in the same iter (build race).

## Standing debt
- 118 `lean_aux` unmatched nodes (no blueprint entry) — `archon dag-query unmatched`. Planner blueprint
  cleanup, post-terminal; unchanged this iter (no new declarations added).
